The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as a key catalyst for XRP's April 2026 surge, with the token gaining nearly 10% in the past week to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance, signaling a shift to institutional acceptance.[1]
